description: An aerodynamicist working at a heritage aviation museum needs to build a computational model of an inverted gull wing (similar to the F4U Corsair). Read the geometry specification document located at /home/ga/Desktop/gull_wing_spec.txt. In OpenVSP, create a new Wing geometry, modify its topology to have two spanwise panels (by inserting a new section), and apply the specified anhedral and dihedral angles to the respective inboard and outboard sections as detailed in the spec. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/inverted_gull_wing.vsp3.
